overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a gothic wizarding school common room with stone walls, arched windows with purple drapes, and magical floating lights. Students relax on cushions while one student walks through the room. High-quality game engine footage with detailed textures and atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic wizarding common room with rough stone walls and tall arched windows draped in heavy purple fabric. Several students sit on cushioned ottomans around wooden tables reading and conversing beneath floating magical orbs of light. A large tapestry depicting a wizard with a unicorn hangs prominently on the left wall. Midway through the clip, a student walks from left to right across the room, temporarily obscuring the view of the central tables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a gothic wizarding common room where the stillness is briefly interrupted by a passing figure. It begins with a wide view of rough stone walls and tall arched windows draped in heavy purple fabric, while students relax on cushioned ottomans beneath floating magical orbs of light. The gaze lingers on a large tapestry of a wizard and a unicorn hanging on the left wall as the quiet academic mood persists. The scene then shifts as a student walks from left to right across the frame, temporarily obscuring the central tables and the students conversing there. Finally, the view clears as the student exits the frame, returning the room to its serene, magically lit state.
